title: Option to set whether new boards are included or excluded from my work by default

posts.author: lachlan (Lachlan)
posts.cookedHtml:
My work currently defaults to include new boards automatically.
It would be great to be able to set whether you want new boards to be added automatically or not.

Similar to the feature on dashboards with the checkbox that asks whether you want to add new boards to existing charts.

Alternatively/also the ability to select all/deselect all boards.

Currently environments that have a high number of boards / boards generated from templates for example that include a person column that you might be assigned to as an admin get added to your my work section automatically making it impractical to use a really great feature of monday for certain users.
